case_title: CITIBANK(SOUTH DAKOTA),N.A.,NATIONAL BANKING ASSOC vs. KAZYNSKI, KATHLEEN et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-05-1996, CONTINUED TO MAY-06-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR FILING AND ENTERING DEFAULT JUDGMENT BEFORE 4/26/96. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBANK(SOUTH DAKOTA),N.A.,NATIONAL BANKING ASSOC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAZYNSKI, KATHLEEN $3,032.63 PRINCIPAL, $630.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $287.53 INTEREST, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,060.16
